'''fothafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ileocutaneous|ileocutaneous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ileocutaneous|ileocutaneous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fothafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fothafithi|fothafithi]] || [[word:fothafiji|fothafiji]] || [[word:fothafishi|fothafishi]] || [[word:fothafiki|fothafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fothafuthuthu|fothafuthuthu]] || [[word:fothafujuju|fothafujuju]] || [[word:fothafushushu|fothafushushu]] || [[word:fothafukuku|fothafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fothafuthu|fothafuthu]] || [[word:fothafuju|fothafuju]] || [[word:fothafushu|fothafushu]] || [[word:fothafuku|fothafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fothafufthuf|fothafufthuf]] || [[word:fothafufjuf|fothafufjuf]] || [[word:fothafufshuf|fothafufshuf]] || [[word:fothafufkuf|fothafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fothafethe|fothafethe]] || [[word:fothafeje|fothafeje]] || [[word:fothafeshe|fothafeshe]] || [[word:fothafeke|fothafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fothafothotho|fothafothotho]] || [[word:fothafojojo|fothafojojo]] || [[word:fothafoshosho|fothafoshosho]] || [[word:fothafokoko|fothafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fothafotho|fothafotho]] || [[word:fothafojo|fothafojo]] || [[word:fothafosho|fothafosho]] || [[word:fothafoko|fothafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fothafofthof|fothafofthof]] || [[word:fothafofjof|fothafofjof]] || [[word:fothafofshof|fothafofshof]] || [[word:fothafofkof|fothafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfthĂŻf|fothafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfjĂŻf|fothafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfshĂŻf|fothafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfkĂŻf|fothafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|fothafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|fothafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|fothafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|fothafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfthĂŻf|fothafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfjĂŻf|fothafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfshĂŻf|fothafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfkĂŻf|fothafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfthĂŻf|fothafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfjĂŻf|fothafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfshĂŻf|fothafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fothafĂŻfkĂŻf|fothafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fothafĂŠthĂŠ|fothafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fothafĂŠjĂŠ|fothafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fothafĂŠshĂŠ|fothafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fothafĂŠkĂŠ|fothafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fothafathatha|fothafathatha]] || [[word:fothafajaja|fothafajaja]] || [[word:fothafashasha|fothafashasha]] || [[word:fothafakaka|fothafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fothafatha|fothafatha]] || [[word:fothafaja|fothafaja]] || [[word:fothafasha|fothafasha]] || [[word:fothafaka|fothafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fothafafthaf|fothafafthaf]] || [[word:fothafafjaf|fothafafjaf]] || [[word:fothafafshaf|fothafafshaf]] || [[word:fothafafkaf|fothafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fothafasha|fothafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fothafshĂ«asha|fothafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fothafroasha|fothafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fothafmuasha|fothafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fothafyaasha|fothafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofothafnkshĂ«asha|gofothafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofothafnkroasha|gofothafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofothafnkmuasha|gofothafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofothafnkyaasha|gofothafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fothathafasha|fothathafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fothathafshĂ«asha|fothathafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fothathafroasha|fothathafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fothathafmuasha|fothathafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fothathafyaasha|fothathafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofothathafnkshĂ«asha|gofothathafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofothathafnkroasha|gofothathafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofothathafnkmuasha|gofothathafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofothathafnkyaasha|gofothathafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fethĂŠfasha|fethĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fethĂŠfshĂ«asha|fethĂŠfshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fethĂŠfroasha|fethĂŠfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fethĂŠfmuasha|fethĂŠfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fethĂŠfyaasha|fethĂŠfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofethĂŠfnkshĂ«asha|gofethĂŠfnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofethĂŠfnkroasha|gofethĂŠfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofethĂŠfnkmuasha|gofethĂŠfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofethĂŠfnkyaasha|gofethĂŠfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fothfafasha|fothfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fothfafshĂ«asha|fothfafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fothfafroasha|fothfafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fothfafmuasha|fothfafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fothfafyaasha|fothfafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofothfafnkshĂ«asha|gofothfafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofothfafnkroasha|gofothfafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofothfafnkmuasha|gofothfafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofothfafnkyaasha|gofothfafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
